rows.label: tlk70000004_06_msg0001
rows.name:
Oh! It's you guys! Do you have
any idea what's going on?!

rows.label: tlk70000004_06_msg0002
rows.name:
For their own safety, I've had Torque
the weapon seller and Ellis the
accessory vendor hide in my inn.

rows.label: tlk70000004_06_msg0003
rows.name:
Whether you run or fight
that black giant, feel free
to rest at my place anytime!
